name: Filo Nests
recipeIngredient: 8 teaspoons Finely chopped pecans or cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Take one filo sheet and lightly spray with non-stick cooking spray.
2. Sprinkle the center with one teaspoon of nuts.
3. Top with another filo sheet and lightly spray with cooking spray.
4. Fold over four corners of the top sheet toward the center.
5. Crimp the bottom filo around the sides to form a 5-inch round shell or nest, creating a hollow center.
6. Repeat with remaining filo sheets, placing them side by side on lightly buttered baking sheets.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15-18 minutes, or until golden brown and crisp throughout.
Makes 8 nests.
